description: memory_beats_model, live (decision 0046): where general knowledge would contradict a stored fact (a fiscal year starting in October, not the usual January), the stored fact wins, is cited, and the answer never silently prefers the model's version.
notes: Adriatic Foods runs its fiscal year from 1 October to 30 September — Ana confirmed this on the kickoff call.
Ana Kovač at Adriatic Foods is the main contact for the Atlas CRM Migration.
script: When does Adriatic Foods' fiscal year start? Isn't that usually January?
